properties.Test Case: Create a book and paste in "𑒮𑒩𑓂𑒫𑒹 𑒧𑒰𑒢𑒫𑒰𑓁 𑒮𑓂𑒫𑒞𑒢𑓂𑒞𑓂𑒩𑒰𑓁 𑒮𑒧𑒳𑒞𑓂𑒣𑒢𑓂𑒢𑒰𑓁 𑒫𑒩𑓂𑒞𑒢𑓂𑒞𑒹" to the title. Change pages so that the book files will get this name. This Maihilti text contains a surrogate pair that is valid but prone to killing things! You don't need a font, but if you want one, Noto Sans Tirhuta can show it.
properties.Steps: Create a book and paste in "𑒮𑒩𑓂𑒫𑒹 𑒧𑒰𑒢𑒫𑒰𑓁 𑒮𑓂𑒫𑒞𑒢𑓂𑒞𑓂𑒩𑒰𑓁 𑒮𑒧𑒳𑒞𑓂𑒣𑒢𑓂𑒢𑒰𑓁 𑒫𑒩𑓂𑒞𑒢𑓂𑒞𑒹" to the title. Change pages so that the book files will get this name. This Maihilti text contains a surrogate pair that is valid but prone to killing things! You don't need a font, but if you want one, Noto Sans Tirhuta can show it.
